title: sannantha procera
intro: Sannantha procera, also known as the stinkwood or red ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sannantha procera include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Sannantha procera include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves, bark, or roots of the plant.
